response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While his background includes AI-adjacent projects, his direct experience with production-grade GenAI solutions and RAG architectures is less explicitly detailed, warranting further exploration in an interview.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js, aligning with the role's language requirements.
Proven leadership in technical projects, including open-source contributions and mentorship (e.g., workshops, talks).
Hands-on work with AI-agent frameworks (e.g., MCP) and cloud platforms, indicating familiarity with key technologies.
concerns: Limited explicit documentation of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (GenAI focus unclear).
No direct mention of vector databases or RAG architectures in resume highlights.
Staff-level roles emphasize technical leadership, but resume leans toward individual contributions.
